texto: Get crazy in prayer. Ask for the seemingly impossible
autor: then watch it happen. Do not make judgments on what you are worthy of. Save the practicality for other aspects of your life.
explicacao: Citação de then watch it happen. Do not make judgments on what you are worthy of. Save the practicality for other aspects of your life. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Get crazy in prayer. Ask for the seemingly impossible” articula reflexao, pooja-ruprell, crazy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
